diffs.migratedCode:
from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket
from threading_service import MessagingService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/threads", tags=["threads"])
service = MessagingService()

@router.get("/{thread_id}")
async def get_thread(thread_id: int):
    return await service.find_thread(thread_id)
diffs.explanation: Migrated from Spring MVC REST controller to FastAPI async endpoints. Key changes: Replaced @Autowired with dependency injection, async/await for non-blocking operations, and WebSocket support for real-time updates.
diffs.impact: Better performance through async I/O, native WebSocket support for live messaging, cleaner Python async/await syntax

diffs.migratedCode:
async def create_message(req: MessageCreateDto) -> Message:
    msg = Message(
        thread_id=req.thread_id,
        content=encrypt_e2e(req.content),  # End-to-end encryption
        sender_id=req.sender_id
    )
    return await message_repo.save(msg)
diffs.explanation: Replaced JDBC direct queries with SQLAlchemy ORM. Added end-to-end encryption for message content. Async/await ensures non-blocking I/O for high-volume message throughput.
diffs.impact: Type-safe database operations, automatic encryption at persistent layer, better scalability with async processing
